item.title: 07 Configuring Python & Pip
item.description: Goal In this tutorial you will learn to setup your computer to compile and run code in the Python programming language.

item.title: 41 Configuring Conda and Virtual Environments
item.description: ABSTRACT Learn hwo to create, activate, manage and remoe isolated Python environments using Conda and Python’s built-in venv.

item.title: 10 Jupyter Notebooks
item.description: Goal Learn how to use Jupyter Notebooks for interactive coding, data exploration, and scientific communication.

item.title: 08 Configuring Conda & venv
item.description: Goal Learn how to create, activate, manage, and remove isolated Python environments using Conda and Python’s built-in venv.

item.title: 11 NumPy and Pandas
item.description: Goal Learn the fundamentals of NumPy (numerical computing) and Pandas (data manipulation).

item.title: 12 Matplotlib and Data Visualization
item.description: Goal Learn how to create professional plots and visualizations using Matplotlib.

item.title: 13 SciPy and Fitting
item.description: Goal Learn how to use SciPy for advanced statistical analysis and curve fitting.

item.title: 14 Creating Packages
item.description: Goal In this onboarding tutorial you will learn how to set up your repo structure and additional files to create your own pip package as well as getting a DOI and uploading it to pypi.

item.title: 16 Docker
item.description: Goal Learn how to use Docker to containerize your Python applications and ensure consistent environments across different machines.

item.title: 21 Code of Conduct
item.description: Adapted from the Contributor Covenant, version 2.1 TL;DR Be kind, be respectful, be professional.
